dashboard.title: Overview
dashboard.subtitle: What your workspace did lately.
dashboard.analyticsDegraded: Event analytics offline — start the full stack
dashboard.timelineSubtitle: Tracked events with email opens and clicks broken out.
dashboard.timelineEmpty: No events yet. Install the tracking snippet or send a campaign.
dashboard.timelineNeedsStack: Event analytics needs ClickHouse — run task up:full.

onboarding.title: Create your organization
onboarding.subtitle: Where your team, contacts, and journeys live
onboarding.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

invite.title: You're invited
invite.bodyAnonymous: Create an account or log in with the invited email address first.
invite.returnHint: Then open the invitation link from your email again.
invite.genericError: This invitation can't be accepted. It may have expired.

members.title: Settings
members.subtitle: Members and access for {org}
members.membersSubtitle: People with access to this organization
members.inviteSubtitle: They'll receive an email with a join link.
members.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

sso.title: Single sign-on
sso.subtitle: Let members of your domains sign in through your identity provider (OIDC).
sso.addSubtitle: Members whose email matches the domain will be routed to this identity provider.
sso.empty: No identity providers yet. Add one to enable single sign-on for your team.
sso.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

scim.title: SCIM provisioning
scim.subtitle: Let your identity provider create and deactivate members automatically (SCIM 2.0).
scim.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
scim.tokenSubtitle: Copy it into your identity provider now — it's shown only once. Regenerating replaces it.

apiKeys.title: API keys
apiKeys.subtitle: Authenticate the public REST API. Each key is scoped to this organization.
apiKeys.createSubtitle: Give it a name so you can recognize it later.
apiKeys.name: Name
apiKeys.empty: No API keys yet. Create one to call the REST API.
apiKeys.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
apiKeys.secretSubtitle: Copy it now — it's shown only once. Send it as a Bearer token to the API.
apiKeys.scopesHint: Tick nothing for full access. Write includes read.

auth.verifyBody: We sent you a verification link. Click it to activate your account.
auth.name: Name
auth.ssoEmailRequired: Enter your work email to continue with single sign-on.
auth.ssoNoProvider: No single sign-on is configured for that email domain.
auth.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.inviteOnlyBody: This Helio does not accept public signups. Ask an admin to invite you — invitations arrive by email.

forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: We will email you a reset link.
forgot.sent: If that address has an account, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.

reset.title: Choose a new password
reset.subtitle: You followed a reset link — set the new password here.
reset.done: Password updated — log in with the new one.
reset.failed: That link is invalid or expired — request a new one.
reset.missingToken: This page needs a reset link from your email.

change.title: Update your password
change.subtitle: Your organization requires a fresh password. Other sessions sign out when you change it.
change.failed: The current password did not match.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.body: The error has been recorded. Try again, and if it persists check the server logs.
errors.notFoundBody: The page you are looking for does not exist.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.empty: No contacts yet. Add one or import a CSV.
contacts.dialogSubtitle: Email is the unique identifier within a workspace.
contacts.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

import.title: Import contacts
import.subtitle: CSV with a header row; an email column is required. Extra columns become attributes. HubSpot, Mailchimp, and Klaviyo exports are detected automatically, including who's unsubscribed.
import.suppressed: {count, plural, one {# contact imported as unsubscribed} other {# contacts imported as unsubscribed}}
import.parseError: Could not parse that file as CSV.
import.mapSubtitle: Tell Helio what each column means — the suggestions come from the file itself.
import.previewSubtitle: A last look before anything is written.
import.runSubtitle: Importing in the background — progress updates live.
import.truncated: Large file — the first {max} rows will be imported.
import.needEmail: Map one column to Email to continue.
import.companies: {count} companies will be matched or created.
import.updateExisting: Update contacts that already exist (unsubscribes always stick)
import.connectorTitle: Or pull straight from a platform
import.connectorEmpty: Connect HubSpot, Mailchimp, or Klaviyo under Settings → Provider credentials first — then your contacts import with one click here.

scoring.title: Scoring rules
scoring.subtitle: Move contact scores when events happen.

export.truncated: Export capped at 10,000 rows — narrow the filter for the rest

segments.title: Segments
segments.editorSubtitle: Contacts matching the rule are members — always live, no syncing.
segments.name: Name
segments.previewIncomplete: Finish the rule to preview matches
segments.previewCount: {count, plural, one {# contact matches} other {# contacts match}}
segments.emptyBody: Create a dynamic audience from contact fields and attributes.

emails.title: Email templates
emails.editorSubtitle: Compose with blocks; personalize with '{{'tokens'}}'. The preview renders the real email.
emails.name: Name
emails.subject: Subject
emails.emptyBody: Design a reusable email with the block editor.

editor.previewEmpty: Add a block with content to see the rendered email.
editor.uploadFailed: The image could not be uploaded

campaigns.title: Campaigns
campaigns.createSubtitle: Pick a template and an audience; sending runs durably on the worker.
campaigns.name: Name
campaigns.emptyBody: Create one from a template and a segment or list.
campaigns.subjectBPlaceholder: Variant subject — the template's subject is A
campaigns.autoWinner: Auto-pick the winner (test a slice, then send the best subject to the rest)

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe from marketing email
unsubscribe.body: Stop marketing email to {email}? You can always opt back in later.
unsubscribe.doneBody: {email} will no longer receive marketing email.
unsubscribe.invalidBody: This unsubscribe link is invalid or no longer applies.

deals.title: Deals
deals.subtitle: Track opportunities through your pipeline — drag-free, keyboard-friendly stages.
deals.emptyBody: Create your first pipeline to start tracking deals. It comes with Lead, Qualified, Proposal, Won, and Lost stages.
deals.newDealSubtitle: Add an opportunity to the pipeline.
deals.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

journeys.title: Journeys
journeys.editorSubtitle: Wire the trigger through sends, waits, and branches. Runs execute durably per contact.
journeys.triggerSummary: On “{event}” · {steps, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}}
journeys.emptyBody: Automate a welcome series: trigger on an event, send, wait, branch.

editor.name: Name
editor.connectHint: New steps wire themselves to the open end; drag between handles to rewire.

forms.title: Forms
forms.createSubtitle: A hosted signup page that adds submitters to your contacts.
forms.name: Name
forms.emptyBody: Host a signup page and grow your audience.

hostedForm.subtitle: Sign up to hear from us.
hostedForm.thanksBody: Thanks for signing up — we'll be in touch.
hostedForm.notFoundBody: This form doesn't exist or was removed.

copilot.title: AI Copilot
copilot.subtitle: Ask about your audience, or describe a segment, journey, or email and let AI draft it.
copilot.chatSubtitle: Grounded in this workspace's data — it only sees your organization.
copilot.chatEmpty: Ask anything: “How many pro contacts do I have?”, “Which journeys are active?”
copilot.segmentSubtitle: Plain English → a segment rule you can save.
copilot.segmentPlaceholder: e.g. pro customers who opened an email in the last week
copilot.journeySubtitle: Plain English → a journey wired to your templates.
copilot.journeyPlaceholder: e.g. welcome email, wait 2 days, then upsell pro users
copilot.emailSubtitle: Plain English → an on-brand email, grounded in your past sends.
copilot.emailPlaceholder: e.g. win back trial users whose trial ends this week

suggestions.contacts: How many contacts joined this month?
suggestions.journeys: Which journeys are active right now?
suggestions.engagement: Which campaign got the most opens this week?

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.subtitle: Calls, emails, meetings, and to-dos — grouped by when they're due.
tasks.newTaskSubtitle: Add a to-do, call, email, or meeting.
tasks.emptyBody: Create your first task to keep track of calls, emails, meetings, and follow-ups.
tasks.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

webhooks.title: Webhooks
webhooks.subtitle: POST signed JSON to your systems when events happen in this workspace.
webhooks.createSubtitle: We sign every delivery with a per-endpoint secret (x-helio-signature).
webhooks.pickEvent: Choose at least one event to send.
webhooks.secretSubtitle: Copy it now — it is shown once. Verify deliveries with it against the x-helio-signature header.
webhooks.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

branding.title: Branding
branding.subtitle: White-label the dashboard and your hosted pages with your own name, color, and logo.
branding.name: Display name
branding.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

scheduling.title: Scheduling
scheduling.subtitle: Share a booking link; invitees pick an open slot and it lands as a meeting.
scheduling.name: Meeting name
scheduling.badHours: End time must be after the start time.
scheduling.pickDay: Pick at least one available day.
scheduling.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

booking.notFoundBody: This booking page does not exist or is not accepting bookings right now.
booking.bookedBody: Your meeting is confirmed. A calendar invite is on its way.
booking.subtitle: Pick a time for your {minutes}-minute meeting.
booking.noSlots: No open times in the next two weeks. Please check back soon.
booking.name: Your name

error.unavailable: That time is no longer available.
error.taken: That slot was just taken — please pick another.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Connect external platforms; their events sync into your CDP.
integrations.connectSubtitle: Paste your shop domain and the app secret used to sign Shopify webhooks.
integrations.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
integrations.connectSfSubtitle: New contacts sync to Salesforce as Leads. Paste your instance URL and an access token.

support.open: Report a bug or send feedback
support.title: Report a bug or send feedback
support.subtitle: Tell us what happened. We capture the page you're on for context.
support.subject: Subject
support.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
support.panelSubtitle: Bug reports and feedback filed by your team.

welcome.title: Welcome to Helio
welcome.body: A quick tour of what you can do here. It takes 30 seconds — skip anytime.

contacts.title: Your customer data
contacts.body: Import contacts, then slice them into live segments with the visual builder.

journeys.title: Automate journeys
journeys.body: Design multi-step journeys on the canvas — email, SMS, WhatsApp, push, waits, and branches — that run durably.

copilot.title: Let AI help
copilot.body: Describe a segment, journey, or on-brand email in a sentence and the copilot drafts it.

crm.title: Close the loop
crm.body: Track deals, file tasks, book meetings, and watch opens and clicks land in analytics.

support.title: We're here
support.body: Hit the life-ring in the top bar anytime to report a bug or send feedback. Enjoy!

deliverability.title: Email deliverability
deliverability.subtitle: Authenticate your sending domains so inboxes trust your mail.
deliverability.addSubtitle: We'll generate a DKIM key and show the records to publish.
deliverability.added: Domain added — publish the records, then verify
deliverability.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

landing.title: Landing pages
landing.subtitle: Build hosted pages with a few blocks and capture signups.
landing.empty: No landing pages yet. Create one to get started.
landing.invalidBlocks: Check your blocks — image and button URLs must be complete.
landing.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

hostedLanding.notFound: This page does not exist or is not published.

widgets.title: On-site widgets
widgets.subtitle: Show banners and popups on your own site with a one-line embed.
widgets.empty: No widgets yet. Create one and drop the embed on your site.
widgets.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
widgets.embedHint: Add this once to your site, swapping in a workspace write key.
widgets.dialogSubtitle: Banners pin to the bottom; popups float in the corner.
widgets.name: Name
widgets.previewBodyFallback: Your message appears here as visitors will see it.

inApp.title: In-app messages
inApp.subtitle: Compose messages shown inside your product to identified visitors, delivered from a journey’s “Send in-app” step.
inApp.empty: No in-app messages yet. Create one, then add a “Send in-app” step to a journey.
inApp.deliveryHint: Messages are queued per contact when a journey reaches a “Send in-app” step. The tracking SDK fetches and displays them for the signed-in visitor.
inApp.dialogHint: Title and body are shown to the visitor. The optional call to action links somewhere in your product.
inApp.previewBodyFallback: Your message appears here as users will see it.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Behavioral analytics over your event stream — conversion funnels, cohort retention, multi-touch attribution, and an ad-hoc SQL explorer.
insights.noClickhouse: Connect the analytics store (ClickHouse) to see this report. Start the full stack with the “full” Compose profile.

funnel.title: Conversion funnel
funnel.subtitle: How many people complete each step, in order, within the window.
funnel.hint: Enter at least two event names, then run the funnel.

retention.title: Cohort retention
retention.subtitle: Each weekly cohort and the share still active in later weeks.
retention.empty: No activity in this window yet.

attribution.title: Multi-touch attribution
attribution.subtitle: Credit conversions to the campaigns that touched each person beforehand.
attribution.hint: Name the event that counts as a conversion, then run attribution.
attribution.empty: No credited touches in this window yet.
attribution.converters: {count} converters with a prior campaign touch

sql.title: SQL explorer
sql.subtitle: Run read-only SQL over your workspace’s events.
sql.label: SQL query
sql.guardrails: Read-only · events table only · auto-scoped to this workspace · capped at 1,000 rows

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.subtitle: Protect your account with an authenticator app
twoFactor.body: When enabled, signing in asks for a 6-digit code from your authenticator app in addition to your password. Backup codes cover a lost device.
twoFactor.scanBody: Scan with your authenticator app (or enter the URI manually), store the backup codes somewhere safe, then confirm a code. 2FA only turns on after a code verifies.
twoFactor.backupCodesBody: Each code signs you in once if you lose your device. This is the only time they are shown.
twoFactor.challengeBody: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
twoFactor.backupPrompt: Enter one of your single-use backup codes.

guide.title: Usage guide
guide.subtitle: How to get things done in Helio, feature by feature. New here? The 30-second tour is the fastest start.
guide.support: Stuck or found a bug? Use the life buoy in the top bar — reports land in your support inbox under Settings.

contacts.title: Bring in your audience
contacts.body: Import a CSV, capture signups from forms, or send events through the tracking SDK. Every person becomes one profile with traits, scores, and a full activity timeline.

segments.title: Slice it with live segments
segments.body: Build nested and/or rules over traits, behavior, scores, and AI predictions. Membership previews live as you edit and stays continuously up to date.

emails.title: Design on-brand emails
emails.body: Compose with blocks, personalize with '{{'tokens'}}', and preview exactly what each contact receives. Templates are shared by campaigns and journeys.

campaigns.title: Send a campaign
campaigns.body: Pick a template and an audience, A/B test the subject line, then watch opens and clicks stream into the dashboard.

journeys.title: Automate journeys
journeys.body: Drag a multi-step automation onto the canvas: emails, SMS, WhatsApp, push, in-app, waits, branches, and A/B splits. Journeys run durably — restarts never double-send.

growth.title: Capture and convert
growth.body: Hosted forms, landing pages, on-site widgets, and in-app messages — each one feeds new contacts straight into segments and journeys.

insights.title: Measure what works
insights.body: Funnels, cohort retention, multi-touch attribution, and a read-only SQL explorer over your event stream.

copilot.title: Let AI do the heavy lifting
copilot.body: Describe a segment, journey, or email in plain English and the copilot drafts it from your own data — grounded, tenant-scoped, and editable before anything runs.

crm.title: Close the loop with CRM
crm.body: Track deals through pipeline stages, work tasks by due date, and share a booking link that turns meetings into contacts automatically.

settings.title: Run it your way
settings.body: Invite teammates, brand the workspace, mint scoped API keys, wire webhooks and integrations, and harden access with 2FA, SSO, and SCIM.

install.title: Install Helio as an app
install.subtitle: Its own window, its own icon — no browser chrome.
install.chrome: Chrome / Edge: the install icon at the right of the address bar, or menu → Cast, save and share → Install page as app.
install.safari: Safari (Mac): File → Add to Dock. iPhone/iPad: Share → Add to Home Screen.
install.android: Android Chrome: menu → Add to home screen.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Version, license, and project links for this Helio deployment.
about.updateAvailable: Update available: {version} — view the release notes

credentials.title: Provider credentials
credentials.subtitle: Connect the services Helio sends through. Secrets are encrypted at rest and shown masked — they never leave the server.
credentials.addSubtitle: Enter your {kind} details. Secrets are sealed with AES-256-GCM before they reach the database.
credentials.name: Name
credentials.confirmDelete: Remove "{name}"? Sends that depend on it will fall back to the deployment defaults.
credentials.encryptionMissing: HELIO_ENCRYPTION_KEY is not set on this deployment, so credentials cannot be stored. Add it to your environment and restart.
credentials.emailFallbackNotice: No provider connected — mail uses the deployment fallback SMTP. In local setups that is Mailpit, a test inbox: nothing reaches real recipients until you connect a provider here.

analyticsSettings.title: Workspace analytics
analyticsSettings.subtitle: Which event names count as a conversion for predictive scoring in the active workspace. Leave empty to use the deployment default.
analyticsSettings.label: Conversion events (comma-separated)

backups.title: Backups
backups.subtitle: Nightly local database backups, taken by the bundled backup service. Restore from the command line with the helio restore command.
backups.queued: Backup queued — it appears below within ~20 seconds
backups.stale: No successful backup in the last 36 hours — check helio logs backup.
backups.empty: No backups yet. The nightly run is scheduled; you can also back up now.
backups.label: Label
backups.restoreHint: Keep a copy of your .env with these files — restoring on a new machine needs the same encryption key.

churnModel.title: Churn prediction model
churnModel.subtitle: Bring your own churn model: upload an ONNX or XGBoost file, or point Helio at a model server. The active model scores every contact on the next recompute, and Helio falls back to its built-in model if yours ever fails.
churnModel.uploadHint: ONNX (.onnx) or XGBoost JSON (.json), up to 50 MiB. Pickle files are not accepted — export scikit-learn models with skl2onnx.
churnModel.endpointHint: Helio POSTs JSON with feature_names and inputs (rows of numbers) and expects predictions back — one probability per row. See the docs for the exact contract.
churnModel.authHint: Stored encrypted in the credential vault; sent as the Authorization header on every call.
churnModel.validated: Model validated — it is ready to activate.
churnModel.exportHint: Download this workspace’s training data (features + churn label) as CSV.
churnModel.autoMappingHint: Helio maps all {count} computed contact features to your model automatically, in the training-data export’s column order — train on that export and it plugs straight in.

admin.title: Admin
admin.subtitle: Audit trail, reports, and system health for this organization.

audit.truncated: Export capped at 1,000 rows — narrow the filters for the rest.
audit.empty: No audit entries match these filters yet.

reports.sendsHint: Email and in-app deliveries per day, across the organization.
reports.campaignsHint: By emails sent, with opens and clicks from the analytics store.
reports.engagementDown: Opens and clicks need the analytics store (ClickHouse), which is not reachable right now — send counts remain accurate.
reports.membersHint: Audited actions per member, last 30 days.

health.servicesHint: Every Helio service, with the version it reports.
health.storesHint: Data stores by reachability, plus the operational pulse.
health.alertsHint: Raised by send, backup, and model failures. One unread alert per cause.

database.editSubtitle: Validated server-side; every change lands in the audit log.
database.deleteSubtitle: Row {id} will be permanently deleted (owners only). Related data may cascade.

contactDetail.notFound: This contact does not exist (or belongs to another workspace).
contactDetail.noTraits: No traits yet — they arrive with identify calls and imports.
contactDetail.notesHint: Pinned notes stay on top. Visible to your whole team.
contactDetail.timelineHint: Emails, behavioral events, and changes — newest first.
contactDetail.timelineDegraded: Emails and changes shown; behavioral events need the analytics store (ClickHouse), which is not reachable right now.

dealDetail.notFound: This deal does not exist (or belongs to another workspace).
dealDetail.notesHint: Pinned notes stay on top. Visible to your whole team.
dealDetail.historyHint: Every recorded change to this deal, newest first.

companies.title: Companies
companies.subtitle: B2B accounts — attach contacts and deals from their detail pages.
companies.name: Name
companies.empty: No companies yet — add the first one.

salesReports.title: Sales reports
salesReports.subtitle: Pipeline, win rate, cycle time, and the leaderboard — for the active workspace.
salesReports.forecastHint: Open pipeline × win rate to date — a simple, honest estimate.
salesReports.byStageHint: Open deals only; closed deals leave the pipeline.
salesReports.noWins: No wins yet — they will land here.

setup.title: Welcome to Helio
setup.subtitle: One minute of setup: you, your organization, and you are in.
setup.name: Your name
setup.emailHint: Verified automatically on first-run — no mail provider exists yet.
setup.afterNote: Email sending, your AI key, branding, and demo data all live in Settings — the dashboard will point you there.
setup.signInFailed: Setup succeeded but sign-in failed — use the login page.
setup.seedDemo: Start with sample data to explore (you can delete it any time)

checklist.title: Get Helio ready
checklist.launch: Create your first campaign or journey

passwordPolicy.title: Password policy
passwordPolicy.subtitle: Require members to rotate their passwords on a schedule.
passwordPolicy.note: Members past the deadline are routed to a password change at sign-in. SSO-only members are unaffected — they have no Helio password.
passwordPolicy.require2fa: Require two-factor authentication for every member
passwordPolicy.require2faNote: Members without 2FA are taken to Security settings until they enroll. Any RFC-6238 authenticator app works.

security.body: Two-factor codes work with any authenticator app — Google Authenticator, Authy, 1Password, Microsoft Authenticator, or any other RFC-6238 TOTP app. Scan the QR code once; backup codes cover a lost phone.

require2fa.banner: Your organization requires two-factor authentication. Enable it below (any authenticator app works) to continue.
